name: Palm Bowl Kitchen
description: A steady lunch stop for palm butter, greens, and rice bowls prepared for quick midday service.

name: Atlantic Grill House
description: Known for grilled fish, bright sides, and a calm dinner setting near the ocean side of the city.

name: Broad Street Coffee Bar
description: A compact coffee stop for breakfast meetings, pastries, and quick work sessions downtown.

name: Cassava Leaf Corner
description: A casual spot with generous plates of cassava leaf, fried plantain, and pepper sauce.

name: Congo Town Shawarma
description: Fast evening wraps, grilled chicken, and fresh sauces for people moving through Congo Town.

name: Pepper Coast Table
description: A small dining room pairing familiar Liberian flavors with modern plating and seasonal sides.

name: Plantain Yard
description: Plantain plates, bean stews, salads, and fresh juices served in a relaxed courtyard.

name: Mesurado Brunch Room
description: A comfortable brunch stop with coffee, eggs, fruit bowls, and quiet indoor seating.

name: Jollof Junction
description: Quick jollof plates with chicken, fish, or vegetables for dependable weekday meals.

name: Harbor Fruit Stand
description: Fresh fruit cups and juices for a light breakfast or a cool stop during errands.

name: Sinkor Noodle Shop
description: Warm noodle bowls, stir-fried vegetables, and quick service for weeknight dinners.

name: Beach Road Fish Fry
description: Fried fish, spicy pepper, and simple sides served in a casual sunset-friendly setting.

name: Red Light Rice House
description: Affordable rice plates with rotating gravies for a filling local lunch.

name: Embassy Garden Cafe
description: A polished cafe setting for sandwiches, coffee, and afternoon conversations.

name: Caldwell Pepper Soup
description: A warm evening place for pepper soup, rice, and shared plates with friends.
